result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 11:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%%owner%%'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(old_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id,
         case_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(ownerid,'^#','') AS agent_id, id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(new_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM owner_changes
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id",
       COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) AS cases_handled,
       COALESCE(COUNT(t.case_id),0) AS transfer_count
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
GROUP BY h.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(COUNT(t.case_id),0) ASC, COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(old_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id,
         case_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(ownerid,'^#','') AS agent_id, id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(new_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM owner_changes
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id",
       COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) AS cases_handled,
       COALESCE(COUNT(t.case_id),0) AS transfer_count
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
GROUP BY h.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(COUNT(t.case_id),0) ASC, COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(old_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id,
         case_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(ownerid,'^#','') AS agent_id, id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(new_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM owner_changes
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id",
       COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) AS cases_handled,
       COALESCE(COUNT(t.case_id),0) AS transfer_count
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
GROUP BY h.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(COUNT(t.case_id),0) ASC, COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS asof,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_ts
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(old_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id,
         case_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(c.ownerid,'^#','') AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(new_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM owner_changes
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
GROUP BY h.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(COUNT(t.case_id),0) ASC, COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS asof,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_ts
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(old_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id,
         case_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
handled AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(c.ownerid,'^#','') AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(new_owner,'^#','') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM owner_changes
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
GROUP BY h.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(COUNT(t.case_id),0) ASC, COUNT(DISTINCT h.case_id) DESC, h.agent_id
LIMIT 1;
